entities.name: CASTOR
entities.description: The crop affected by wilt disease and the subject of susceptibility testing

entities.name: WILT DISEASE
entities.description: A disease causing productivity loss in castor crops

entities.name: FUSARIUM OXYSPORUM F. SP. RICINI
entities.description: The fungal pathogen responsible for causing castor wilt disease

entities.name: INDIA
entities.description: The country where the castor-growing agro-climatic zones and isolates were studied

entities.name: MORPHOLOGICAL FEATURES
entities.description: Physical characteristics of the pathogen including radial growth and conidia size

entities.name: PATHOGENIC FEATURES
entities.description: Characteristics related to the virulence and ability of the pathogen to cause disease

entities.name: MOLECULAR FEATURES
entities.description: Genetic characteristics of the pathogen analyzed using molecular markers

entities.name: BIPLOT ANALYSIS
entities.description: A statistical method used to group isolates and rank genotypes for susceptibility

entities.name: PATHOGEN SUSCEPTIBILITY
entities.description: The degree to which different castor genotypes are affected by the pathogen

entities.name: K-MEANS CLUSTER ANALYSIS
entities.description: A clustering method used to study pathogenic variability of isolates

entities.name: ISSR PRIMERS
entities.description: Molecular markers used to analyze genetic variability among pathogen isolates

entities.name: DENDROGRAM ANALYSIS
entities.description: A method used to visualize genetic similarity and group isolates into clusters

entities.name: GENOTYPES
entities.description: Different varieties of castor plants tested for resistance and susceptibility
